title: BTS, 신곡 'ARIRANG' 글로벌 차트 1위
summary: BTS의 새 앨범 타이틀곡 '아리랑(ARIRANG)'이 전 세계 음악 차트에서 1위를 차지했습니다.
content: BTS's new title track 'ARIRANG' topped global music charts immediately after release. The song combines traditional Korean instruments with modern pop elements. International fans are praising the unique sound and meaningful lyrics. Music videos accumulated millions of views within hours. Streaming numbers have broken previous records. K-pop industry analysts expect sustained popularity. The group's agency announced world tour plans. Cultural experts highlight the song's artistic significance. The track promotes Korean heritage to global audiences. Merchandise sales have surged with the comeback. 'ARIRANG' is being called a masterpiece of cultural fusion.
